summary:
Now let me create the SVG assets:
Now let me build the index/home page:
Continuing the build without loading task tools — the work is straightforward sequential file creation. Let me build the events page next.
Now the site_intent.json:
All 12 files in place. Here's a summary of what I built for **Meeple & Mug**, the playful illustrated board game cafe and tabletop brand:

## What was built

A 7-page chunky-illustrated cafe site in candy-bright tangerine / electric purple / mint / cream, with hex-tile backgrounds, sticker price tags, dice dividers, and meeple mascots — all hand-drawn in inline SVG. No build tooling, no CDNs, no external fonts (system fallbacks via `@font-face local()` chains).

### Pages
- **index.html** — Hero with "Roll · Sip · Repeat" tagline, 3 feature cards, tonight's event strip, featured games row, drinks teaser with sticker price tags, Tavern Pass loyalty band, latest reviews, hours/map cluster
- **menu.html** — Diner-board chalkboard with 4 columns (Bites/Sweets/Sips/Spirits), interactive allergen filter chips, staff pick cards
- **library.html** — Two-pane filter rail (player count slider, play-time chips, complexity dots, mood pills, availability toggle) + 12 hand-illustrated game cards with On Shelf/In Play/Reserved badges and live search + sort
- **events.html** — Color-coded May 2026 calendar grid with month/list toggle, expandable 8-player tournament bracket, weekly leagues sidebar, meetup submission form
- **book.html** — 4-step stepper booking flow (room → date → add-ons → contact) with sticky purple summary sidebar that recalculates total live as you click
- **tavern-pass.html** — Pawn/Knight/Queen tier ladder, perks comparison table, points calculator with tier progress bar, signup form, testimonials
- **reviews.html** — Friday Reviews with lead review + rubric scorecard, 6 secondary cards filterable by rubric chip, reviewer roster with hex-tile portraits, two-column archive

### Shared infrastructure
- **css/style.css** — Full design system: chunky borders, hard drop-shadows, hex tile background (mobile-softened), button/chip/card/panel components, all page-specific layouts
- **js/app.js** — Vanilla JS for nav toggle, library filtering & sort, calendar view toggle, booking stepper + live total, loyalty calculator, allergen & rubric filters, bracket expand
- **assets/hex-bg.svg** — Tiling hex pattern background
- **assets/meeple-mark.svg** — Brand mark & bullet marker

### Files written
```
index.html, menu.html, library.html, events.html, book.html,
tavern-pass.html, reviews.html, css/style.css, js/app.js,
assets/hex-bg.svg, assets/meeple-mark.svg, site_intent.json
```

Required text present: **Meeple & Mug**, **Tavern Pass**, **Roll, Sip, Repeat.** Mobile behavior matches the brief — hex pattern softens, library filters stack, calendar reflows, booking summary becomes inline.
